nasb.text: When day came, Jesus left and went to a secluded place; and the crowds were searching for Him, and came to Him and tried to keep Him from going away from them.

esv.text: And when it was day, he departed and went into a desolate place. And the people sought him and came to him, and would have kept him from leaving them,

cnv.text: 天一亮，耶穌出來，到曠野地方去。眾人尋找他，一直找到他那裡，要留住他，不要他離開他們。

ccb.text: 黎明时，耶稣退到一处僻静的地方。众人四处找祂，找到后想留住祂，不让祂离开。

csbs.text: 天亮的时候，耶稣出去，走到一个荒僻的地方。众人寻找他，来到他那里，想留住他，不让他离开。
